Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Jan-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Bill Lombardini, Esq. (800.800.000: william.lombardini@the barnesfirm.com) of The Barnes Firm, L.C. for Plaintiff.
Tom Lakritz, Esq. (415.554.3963; tom.lakritz@sfcityatty.org) Deputy City Attorney for Defendant/Moving Party, City and County of SF.
Jonathan Louie, Esq. for Defendant.

THE DEFENDANTS STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.
THE PLAINTIFF DID NOT FILE TIMELY OPPOSITIONS TO THIS MOTION.

The court does not hear argument as no timely oppositin was considered.
Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS COMPLAINANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel:
Motions are unopposed and granted as follows: (1) Plaintiff to serve verified responses to form interrogatories and special interrogatories without objections no later than January 31, 2022; (2) Plaintiff to serve a verified response without objections pursuant to CCP 2031.220 and 2031.230 and produce documents in compliance with CCP 2031.280(a) no later than January 31, 2022; (3) Requests for admissions deemed admitted. Defendant's requests for sanctions in the amount of $2200.00 is granted. Payment to be paid to the City and County of San Francisco no later than January 21, 2021.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
